summary: Completed comprehensive testing of LLM Wiki iteration 3 with major backend enhancements. Backend APIs working perfectly (100% success rate) but frontend has session management and data integration issues.

ui_bugs.issue: Shows 'No providers configured' despite backend returning 2 providers (ollama-local, emergent-cloud)

integration_issues.issue: Authentication session not persisting between page navigations - keeps redirecting to login page
Frontend not displaying providers data from backend API despite successful API response

passed_tests: Backend observability status (Langfuse configured and connected)
Backend platform info and health check
Frontend login with admin@llmwiki.local / WikiAdmin2026! works
Frontend dashboard loads with all 6 stat cards (wiki-pages, sessions, sources, providers, api-keys, events)
Frontend health badges visible (MongoDB, Ollama, Langfuse)
Frontend navigation sections visible (CORE, INFRASTRUCTURE, SYSTEM)
Frontend providers page loads (but data not displayed)
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix frontend session management issues causing redirects to login page and resolve providers page data integration issue where backend data is not displayed in frontend

success_percentage.frontend: 60% (login and dashboard work, but navigation and data integration issues)
